product_overview: The Ministry Scheduling App is a web-based platform for coordinating volunteers, schedules, and service run sheets across ministry teams. Phase 1 focuses on syncing music and technical/stage crews through roster building, availability management, shift handling, and a shared live run sheet.
core_goals: Let coordinators build event rosters by assigning volunteers to roles
Allow volunteers to manage their availability and view their schedule-related information
Enable teams to create and maintain a shared run sheet for services
Support volunteer approval and profile management for onboarding and skill tracking
Provide volunteers and coordinators with tools to handle shift swaps and coverage requests
Help administrators review ministry-wide analytics and reporting

features.name: Volunteer Registration
features.description: Public registration form where interested individuals can submit their contact details and areas of interest to request onboarding.
user_flows: Navigate to /register -> Fill in contact details -> Select areas of interest -> Submit the registration form -> See confirmation that the request was received

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login access for authorized users through the app's development bypass flow.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Click Admin Role (Marcus) button -> See the dashboard

features.name: View Events
features.description: Browse the event list, apply filters, and open an event workspace to review event details.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/events -> View the list of events -> Filter events by status and time -> Open an event workspace -> See event roster and details

features.name: Build Roster
features.description: Create and update an event roster by assigning volunteers to roles for a scheduled service.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/events -> Open an event workspace -> Start assigning a volunteer to a role -> Select a volunteer and role -> Confirm the assignment appears in the roster

features.name: Build Run Sheet
features.description: Arrange songs and service cues in order for an event, including notes for transitions and technical direction.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/events -> Open the run sheet builder -> View run sheet items -> Drag and drop items to reorder them -> Add a new song or cue -> Add transition notes -> See the updated run sheet order

features.name: Volunteer Management
features.description: Search the volunteer directory and review individual volunteer profiles, skills, and journey information.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/volunteers -> View the volunteer directory -> Search for a volunteer by name -> Open a volunteer profile -> View skills and journey information

features.name: Volunteer Approval
features.description: Review pending volunteer registrations and approve or reject them during the onboarding process.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/volunteers/approval -> View the pending volunteers list -> Approve a pending volunteer -> See the volunteer status update
Navigate to /dashboard/volunteers/approval -> View the pending volunteers list -> Reject a pending volunteer -> See the volunteer status update

features.name: Song Library
features.description: Manage the shared song library by adding, editing, and searching for songs used in service planning.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/songs -> View the song list -> Add a new song with title, artist, key, and BPM -> See the song appear in the library
Navigate to /dashboard/songs -> Search for a song by title -> Open an existing song -> Edit the song details -> Save the changes

features.name: Availability Management
features.description: Use a calendar to mark personal unavailability and remove date ranges when plans change.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/availability -> View the availability calendar -> Add an unavailability date range with a reason -> See the blocked dates on the calendar
Navigate to /dashboard/availability -> View the availability calendar -> Remove an existing unavailability -> See the dates become available again

features.name: Shift Swaps
features.description: Review and respond to shift swap requests from other volunteers.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/swaps -> View pending swap requests -> Accept a swap request -> See the request move to the accepted state
Navigate to /dashboard/swaps -> View pending swap requests -> Decline a swap request -> See the request move to the declined state

features.name: User Profile
features.description: Edit personal profile information such as name and phone number.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/profile -> View current profile information -> Edit name and phone number -> Save profile changes -> See the updated profile information

features.name: App Settings
features.description: Adjust application preferences, including theme and notification settings.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/settings -> View current settings -> Toggle dark and light theme -> See the theme preference change
Navigate to /dashboard/settings -> View current settings -> Change notification preferences -> Save the updated preferences

features.name: Analytics Dashboard
features.description: Review ministry-wide statistics and reports for volunteer readiness and event coverage.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/analytics -> View volunteer stats -> View event coverage metrics -> View department breakdown -> See the full analytics dashboard

routes.description: Main dashboard with stats and quick links
Event workspace with roster and detail view
Individual volunteer profile and skill management
